gaps.snippet: # [doc = " The **closed v0 set** of diagnostic routes (RFC-0013 §8). Synchronous in-process hand-off."] Stream , # [doc = " The durable **representation-crossing audit view** (RFC-0013 §4.6) — persisted for later"] # [doc = " inspection / EXPLAIN."] Audit , # [doc = " A best-effort textual **log** sink (may be redirected/dropped by the io layer)."] Log , # [doc = " The **null** sink: the presentation is intentionally discarded. Honest — it reports *not"] # [doc = " delivered*; it still does **not** gate propagation (I1: the error bubbles regardless)."] Null , # [doc = " The **mesh** sink: probabilistic gossip/pub-sub delivery across the runtime overlay"] # [doc = " (RFC-0008 §4.3, RT5). Carries a [`Delivery::Probabilistic`] δ; never claimed reliable."] Mesh , }

An unrecognised route is an explicit"] # [doc = " [`UnknownRoute`], never a silent misroute."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Errors"] # [doc = " Returns [`UnknownRoute`] when `s` is not one of the closed v0 routes."] pub fn resolve (s : & str) -> Result < Route , UnknownRoute > { Route :: all () . into_iter () . find (| r | r . as_str () == s) . ok_or_else (| | UnknownRoute { route : s . to_owned () , }) } # [doc = " The RFC-0008 sink this route binds to, with its **honest delivery guarantee** (RT5)."] # [must_use] pub fn binding (self) -> SinkBinding { let (sink , delivery) = match self { Route :: Stream => ("rfc0008.diagnostic-stream" , Delivery :: Synchronous) , Route :: Audit => ("rfc0008.audit-store" , Delivery :: Durable) , Route :: Log => ("rfc0008.text-log" , Delivery :: BestEffort) , Route :: Null => ("rfc0008.null" , Delivery :: Discarded) , Route :: Mesh => ("rfc0008.mesh" , Delivery :: Probabilistic { bound : Bound { kind : BoundKind :: Probability { delta : 0.01 } , basis : BoundBasis :: UserDeclared , } , } ,) , } ; SinkBinding { route : self , sink , delivery , } } }

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " The **honest delivery semantics** of a sink (RT5). The lattice tag a delivery may *claim* is bounded"] # [doc = " by what is honest for v0; [`guarantee`](Delivery::guarantee) reads it off, never upgraded (VR-5)."] # [derive (Debug , Clone , PartialEq)] pub enum Delivery { # [doc = " In-process, synchronous: handed to the sink before the presenting call returns. No loss path in"] # [doc = " v0. Honest strength `Declared`."] Synchronous , # [doc = " Durable append (delivered + persisted). Honest strength `Declared`."] Durable , # [doc = " Best-effort: may be dropped/redirected by the io layer. Honest strength `Declared`, explicitly"] # [doc = " best-effort."] BestEffort , # [doc = " Intentionally discarded (the null sink): **not delivered**, and honestly so."] Discarded , # [doc = " Probabilistic gossip delivery (mesh): carries a declared [`ProbabilityBound`] δ."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " [`ProbabilityBound`]: mycelium_core::BoundKind::Probability"] Probabilistic { # [doc = " The declared failure-probability bound (v0: `UserDeclared` basis — no measured convergence)."] bound : Bound , } , }
gaps.reason: enum `Delivery` has a named-field variant referencing a type not resolvable in-file — emitting it positionally would introduce an unresolved reference that poisons the file's `myc check`; left gapped under the M-1006 resolvability gate (VR-5/G2)

gaps.snippet: impl Delivery { # [doc = " Whether the sink actually **delivers** the presentation. The null sink does not — and says so;"] # [doc = " callers that need a delivery must not route to it expecting one (RT5)."] # [must_use] pub fn delivers (& self) -> bool { ! matches ! (self , Delivery :: Discarded) } # [doc = " The honest **delivery guarantee** on the lattice (RT5/VR-5): `None` for the null sink (nothing"] # [doc = " delivered, so no delivery claim), `Some(strength)` otherwise. v0 never exceeds `Declared` — a"] # [doc = " stronger claim requires a *checked* basis (a proven no-loss property, or measured convergence)."] # [must_use] pub fn guarantee (& self) -> Option < GuaranteeStrength > { match self { Delivery :: Discarded => None , Delivery :: Synchronous | Delivery :: Durable | Delivery :: BestEffort | Delivery :: Probabilistic { .. } => Some (GuaranteeStrength :: Declared) , } } # [doc = " The probabilistic delivery bound, if this is a probabilistic sink (the mesh δ; RT5)."] # [must_use] pub fn probability_bound (& self) -> Option < & Bound > { match self { Delivery :: Probabilistic { bound } => Some (bound) , _ => None , } } }

gaps.snippet: # [cfg (test)] mod tests { use super :: * ; # [test] fn the_v0_route_set_is_closed_and_round_trips () { for r in Route :: all () { assert_eq ! (Route :: resolve (r . as_str ()) . unwrap () , r) ; } let err = Route :: resolve ("diagnostics_channel") . unwrap_err () ; assert_eq ! (err . route , "diagnostics_channel") ; assert ! (err . to_string () . contains ("closed v0 set")) ; } # [test] fn every_sink_guarantee_is_honest_and_never_upgraded () { for r in Route :: all () { let b = r . binding () ; match b . delivery . guarantee () { Some (g) => assert_eq ! (g , GuaranteeStrength :: Declared , "{r} must not over-claim its delivery guarantee (VR-5)") , None => assert ! (! b . delivery . delivers () , "only a non-delivering sink may have no guarantee") , } } let mesh = Route :: Mesh . binding () ; let bound = mesh . delivery . probability_bound () . expect ("mesh is probabilistic") ; assert ! (bound . well_formed ()) ; assert ! (matches ! (bound . kind , BoundKind :: Probability { .. })) ; assert ! (! Route :: Null . binding () . delivery . delivers ()) ; } }
gaps.reason: #[cfg(test)] item — out of scope for this PoC's transpilation surface (excluded from the expressible-fraction denominator, but recorded, never silently skipped)
